name: Textured Windowpane Shower Curtain Beige: Cotton Blend, Dobby Weave - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Elevate your bathroom decor with this Textured Windowpane Shower Curtain from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Designed in a solid beige hue, it features a slightly crinkled construction with a textured windowpane design in cream to add eye-catching flair to your bath space. Boasting a soft cotton-blend dobby construction, this decorative shower curtain features a buttonhole top for easy installation, and you can toss it in the washing machine for a quick refresh when needed.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
